recommendations.title: The Last Prosecco
recommendations.overview: The suicide of a prominent wine producer unleashes a series of mysterious murders.

recommendations.title: The Wing or the Thigh?

recommendations.title: Sideways
recommendations.overview: Two middle-aged men embark on a spiritual journey through Californian wine country. One is an unpublished novelist suffering from depression, and the other is only days away from walking down the aisle.

recommendations.title: A Perfect Pairing
recommendations.overview: To land a major client, an LA wine exec travels to an Australian sheep station, where she signs on as a ranch hand and hits it off with a rugged local.

recommendations.title: Naomi and Ely's No Kiss List
recommendations.overview: The bonds between Naomi and Ely are tested when they fall for the same guy.

recommendations.title: The Fundamentals of Caring
